outcome_summary: PDG papers extraction pre-phase Session δ₁ closed. Product Trajectory ADR 0093 + Phase 6 Scope ADR 0094 landed (ADR collection 92→94; 87 Accepted + 7 Superseded; 51 engine + 43 product). ADR 0094 chose to expand Phase 6 to include Tier-A substrate redesign Clusters 1-5 (dependency order 1→2→4→3→5) BEFORE the SEP/embedding self-correction work commits node-table-dependent migrations — embedding semantic-quality argument per adversarial_review.md E.12.2 + quality-first posture per pushback drawer 1dc03200. In-session reframing: HANDOFF.md's 4-option framing reduced to synthesis.md's empirically-grounded binary; captured as self-pushback drawer cf914c19. Two decisions drawers paired (e8d5de6b for 0093, 6d04110d for 0094). ADR 0084 extraction step triggered for ADR 0094 — 7 load-bearing premises with falsifiers + T1-A/T1-B/T2-A readiness criteria. Cascade landed: STATE.md (ADR count + Phase 6 expansion note + NSWI for S-0203), HANDOFF.md (PDG checklist δ₁ partial-complete + trajectory bullet retires to ADR 0093), per-session changelog (31 lines), product/adr/README.md index (41→43). Session δ₂ (#S-0203) picks up tool-stack ADR + learning-outcome taxonomy ADR + 3 coordination questions + 8 D1-D8 items. Soft-warns this session: adr_back_reference_orphan + adr_index_inconsistent resolved by cascade + README updates; changelog_entry_soft_cap + issue_collision pre-existing; engine_memory_zero_citations_after_search will resolve at step 12 (drawer IDs cited throughout outcome_summary + diary + commit messages).

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — both foundational ADRs landed (product/adr/0093 + 0094) + paired engine_memory decisions drawers (e8d5de6b + 6d04110d) + product/adr/README.md index update + cascade commit (STATE.md + HANDOFF.md + per-session changelog at engine/changelog/2026/S-0202-*.md) + pushback drawer cf914c19 captured per shutdown step 1 + diary entry 641b42fd written. The in-session reframing of HANDOFF's 4-option framing → synthesis.md's empirically-grounded binary was a content refinement within the approved scope (Phase 6 Scope ADR), not a scope change.
